channel.title: Posts on Linuxo blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Linuxo blog

item.title: Пробни текст
item.description: Ово је наслов hugo-extended package files install completed. Performing other installation steps. Downloading hugo-extended 64 bit from ‘https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases/download/v0.55.5/hugo_extended_0.55.5_Windows-64bit.zip' Progress: 100% - Completed download of C:\Users\tomaj\AppData\Local\Temp\chocolatey\hugo-extended\0.55.5\hugo_extended_0.55.5_Windows-64bit.zip (18.68 MB). Download of hugo_extended_0.55.5_Windows-64bit.zip (18.68 MB) completed. Hashes match. var $ = require('jquery/src/core'); require('jquery/src/core/init'); require('jquery/src/manipulation'); Extracting C:\Users\tomaj\AppData\Local\Temp\chocolatey\hugo-extended\0.55.5\hugo_extended_0.55.5_Windows-64bit.zip to C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\lib\hugo-extended\tools… C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\lib\hugo-extended\tools ShimGen has successfully created a shim for hugo.ex
